message:
🐛 Exempt /api/mcp/clusters from API rate limiter (#10925) (#10927)

When JWT auth fails (e.g. expired/invalid token), the frontend retries
requests, which exhausts the API rate limiter (2000 req/min). Once the
limiter is saturated, /api/mcp/clusters returns 429, making cluster
discovery impossible even though the cluster and kc-agent are healthy.

Add /api/mcp/clusters to apiLimiterSkipPaths so cluster discovery
remains functional during auth-retry cascades. The endpoint still
requires JWT authentication — only the rate-limit counting is bypassed.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
